member.name: T:SampleApi.Customers.Address
member.summary: A mailing / shipping address.

member.name: M:SampleApi.Customers.Address.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: A mailing / shipping address.

member.name: T:SampleApi.Customers.Customer
member.summary: A customer account.

member.name: M:SampleApi.Customers.Customer.#ctor(System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,SampleApi.Customers.Address)
member.summary: A customer account.

member.name: T:SampleApi.Customers.CustomerCache
member.summary: Thread-safe in-memory customer store. Registered as a singleton so state persists for the lifetime of the application process.

member.name: M:SampleApi.Customers.CustomerCache.GetAll
member.summary: Returns a read-only snapshot of all customers.

member.name: M:SampleApi.Customers.CustomerCache.GetById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns the customer with the given ID, or null if not found.

member.name: M:SampleApi.Customers.CustomerCache.Add(SampleApi.Customers.Customer)
member.summary: Adds a new customer, assigning a server-generated ID. Returns the created customer.

member.name: M:SampleApi.Customers.CustomerCache.Update(System.Int32,SampleApi.Customers.Customer)
member.summary: Replaces the customer at with the supplied values. Returns the updated customer, or null if no customer with that ID exists.

member.name: M:SampleApi.Customers.CustomerCache.Remove(System.Int32)
member.summary: Removes the customer with . Returns true if the customer was found and removed.

member.name: T:SampleApi.Customers.CustomerEndpoints
member.summary: Registers all /customers routes onto a . Called from Program.cs: app.MapGroup("/customers").WithTags("Customers: Accounts").MapCustomers();

member.name: T:SampleApi.Home.HomeEndpoints
member.summary: Registers the promotional home page route. Called from Program.cs: app.MapHome();

member.name: T:SampleApi.Orders.OrderLine
member.summary: A single line item within an order.

member.name: M:SampleApi.Orders.OrderLine.#ctor(System.Int32,System.String,System.Int32,System.Decimal)
member.summary: A single line item within an order.

member.name: P:SampleApi.Orders.OrderLine.LineTotal
member.summary: Line total: Quantity × UnitPrice.

member.name: T:SampleApi.Orders.Order
member.summary: A customer order with line items and a computed total.

member.name: M:SampleApi.Orders.Order.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32,SampleApi.Orders.OrderStatus,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{SampleApi.Orders.OrderLine},System.DateTime)
member.summary: A customer order with line items and a computed total.

member.name: P:SampleApi.Orders.Order.Total
member.summary: Sum of all line totals (computed, not stored).

member.name: T:SampleApi.Orders.CreateOrderRequest
member.summary: Request body for placing a new order.

member.name: M:SampleApi.Orders.CreateOrderRequest.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{SampleApi.Orders.OrderLineRequest})
member.summary: Request body for placing a new order.

member.name: T:SampleApi.Orders.OrderLineRequest
member.summary: A single line item in a CreateOrderRequest.

member.name: M:SampleApi.Orders.OrderLineRequest.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: A single line item in a CreateOrderRequest.

member.name: T:SampleApi.Orders.OrderStatus
member.summary: Lifecycle states an order can occupy.

member.name: F:SampleApi.Orders.OrderStatus.Pending
member.summary: Order received, awaiting confirmation.

member.name: F:SampleApi.Orders.OrderStatus.Confirmed
member.summary: Order confirmed and being prepared.

member.name: F:SampleApi.Orders.OrderStatus.Shipped
member.summary: Order dispatched to the carrier.

member.name: F:SampleApi.Orders.OrderStatus.Delivered
member.summary: Order delivered to the customer.

member.name: F:SampleApi.Orders.OrderStatus.Cancelled
member.summary: Order cancelled — no further transitions possible.

member.name: T:SampleApi.Orders.OrderCache
member.summary: Thread-safe in-memory order store. Registered as a singleton so state persists for the lifetime of the application process.

member.name: M:SampleApi.Orders.OrderCache.GetAll
member.summary: Returns a read-only snapshot of all orders, newest first.

member.name: M:SampleApi.Orders.OrderCache.GetByCustomer(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns orders belonging to a specific customer, newest first.

member.name: M:SampleApi.Orders.OrderCache.GetByStatus(SampleApi.Orders.OrderStatus)
member.summary: Returns orders in the given status.

member.name: M:SampleApi.Orders.OrderCache.GetById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns the order with the given ID, or null if not found.

member.name: M:SampleApi.Orders.OrderCache.Add(SampleApi.Orders.Order)
member.summary: Creates a new order from a validated request. Returns the created order.

member.name: M:SampleApi.Orders.OrderCache.UpdateStatus(System.Int32,SampleApi.Orders.OrderStatus)
member.summary: Advances or changes an order's status. Returns the updated order, or null if the order does not exist.

member.name: M:SampleApi.Orders.OrderCache.Cancel(System.Int32)
member.summary: Cancels the order with by setting its status to Cancelled. Returns true if found, false if not found.

member.name: T:SampleApi.Orders.OrderEndpoints
member.summary: Registers all /orders routes onto a . Called from Program.cs: app.MapGroup("/orders").WithTags("Orders: Lifecycle").MapOrders();

member.name: T:SampleApi.Products.Product
member.summary: A product in the catalog.

member.name: M:SampleApi.Products.Product.#ctor(System.Int32,System.String,System.Decimal,System.String,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: A product in the catalog.

member.name: T:SampleApi.Products.ProductCache
member.summary: Thread-safe in-memory product store. Registered as a singleton so state persists for the lifetime of the application process.

member.name: M:SampleApi.Products.ProductCache.GetAll
member.summary: Returns a read-only snapshot of all products.

member.name: M:SampleApi.Products.ProductCache.GetById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns the product with the given ID, or null if not found.

member.name: M:SampleApi.Products.ProductCache.GetCategories
member.summary: Returns all distinct category names currently in the catalog.

member.name: M:SampleApi.Products.ProductCache.GetByCategory(System.String)
member.summary: Returns all products in the specified category (case-insensitive).

member.name: M:SampleApi.Products.ProductCache.Add(SampleApi.Products.Product)
member.summary: Adds a new product, assigning a server-generated ID. Returns the created product.

member.name: M:SampleApi.Products.ProductCache.Update(System.Int32,SampleApi.Products.Product)
member.summary: Replaces the product at with the supplied values. Returns the updated product, or null if no product with that ID exists.

member.name: M:SampleApi.Products.ProductCache.Remove(System.Int32)
member.summary: Removes the product with . Returns true if the product was found and removed.

member.name: T:SampleApi.Products.ProductEndpoints
member.summary: Registers all /products routes onto a . Called from Program.cs: app.MapGroup("/products").WithTags("Products: Catalog").MapProducts();

member.name: T:Program
member.summary: Auto-generated public partial Program class for top-level statement apps.

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Type)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a type. Example: T:Namespace.Outer+Inner`1 becomes T:Namespace.Outer.Inner`1

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Reflection.PropertyInfo)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a property. Example: P:Namespace.ContainingType.PropertyName or for an indexer P:Namespace.ContainingType.Item(System.Int32)

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Type,System.String)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a property given its container type and property name. Example: P:Namespace.ContainingType.PropertyName

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Reflection.MethodInfo)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a method (or constructor). For example: M:Namespace.ContainingType.MethodName(ParamType1,ParamType2)~ReturnType M:Namespace.ContainingType.#ctor(ParamType)

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.GetTypeDocId(System.Type,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Generates a documentation ID string for a type. This method handles nested types (replacing '+' with '.'), generic types, arrays, pointers, by-ref types, and generic parameters. The flag controls whether constructed generic type arguments are emitted, while controls whether the generic arity marker (e.g. "`1") is appended.

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.NormalizeDocId(System.String)
member.summary: Normalizes a documentation comment ID to match the compiler-style format. Strips the return type suffix for ordinary methods but retains it for conversion operators.
member.param: The documentation comment ID to normalize.
